description_public: A polygenic estimate related to eye color influence (blue–brown axis) variation in the general population.

GG.effect_label: Strong tendency toward blue or light eyes
GG.notes: This genotype is a major genetic predictor of blue or lighter eye colors, although other pigmentation genes and family background can still modify the final shade.

GA.notes: This genotype is often associated with intermediate or variable eye colors, such as hazel or green, depending on other pigmentation variants and ancestry.

AA.effect_label: Strong tendency toward brown or darker eyes
AA.notes: This genotype is strongly associated with brown or darker eye colors, although other genes can still influence the exact shade.

evidence.title: Placeholder evidence for Eye color influence (blue–brown axis)
evidence.quote: This genotype is a major genetic predictor of blue or lighter eye colors, although other pigmentation genes and family background can still modify the final shade.
